rules.rule: If outreach follow-up is due AND SMTP works AND Auditor >=90 → SEND immediately.
rules.escalation: If not sent within 24h of due date, mark SEND_BLOCKED and report reason.

rules.rule: If SMTP is broken → diagnose and fix. If cannot fix → escalate SEND_BLOCKED_AUTH to Qasem.
rules.escalation: Do not silently skip outreach for multiple days.

rules.rule: If Auditor score <90 → revise until >=90 or HOLD with reason.
rules.escalation: Maximum 2 revision attempts. If still <90, mark REJECTED and move to next prospect.

rules.rule: New prospects: research 5/day, create drafts, Auditor review. Only send if >=90.
rules.escalation: Max 5 new sends per day. Cold outreach + follow-ups combined max 10/day.

rules.rule: Do NOT mark authority step complete unless: follow-up sent, new prospect researched, draft created, or blocked with documented reason.
rules.escalation: No 'checked but did nothing' as completion.

rules.rule: All outreach must go through Auditor before sending. No auto-sending without audit.
rules.escalation: Permanent rule. HARO auto-send was the lesson.
